codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior failure: SIGN preview extraction now supports the real nested runtime context shape (`context.SignSession.session.hashes[0]`) while preserving legacy flat fallback paths, and tests now include the observed nested payload form rather than only synthetic flat fixtures.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission policy and skill guidance remain inconsistent on whether agent-browser is mandatory for UI changes, which continues to produce `followedProcedure: false` even for justified test-covered data-wiring fixes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission policy marks agent-browser mandatory (`/Users/plebdev/.factory/missions/b48100dd-0e6c-4a7c-90a3-f12e61d1c3c4/AGENTS.md`, Testing & Validation Guidance), while `ui-screen-worker` explicitly allows skipping it for pure copy/data-wiring fixes with full Vitest coverage (`.factory/skills/ui-screen-worker/SKILL.md`, Required Skills).

summary: PASS: Reviewed fix feature transcript skeleton and both relevant diffs (`50ac56d6...` original and `a077a2a...` fix). The previous blocking defect (missing SIGN preview for nested runtime context) is resolved by nested SignSession extraction plus defensive/legacy compatibility and runtime-shape test coverage.
